lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior has no scratches or dents. The interior shows no wear and is like new. The engine and transmission are in perfect working order.
Good condition.

This vehicle is in good condition and reflects careful ownership. The exterior paint retains a nice shine, though you will find a few minor stone chips on the front end and some light surface scratches consistent with normal use. Inside, the upholstery is clean and well-preserved, with only minor wear on the driver's seat bolster. Mechanically, the car performs reliably, having been regularly serviced and maintained. It offers a smooth driving experience and is a solid choice for a buyer seeking a well-maintained vehicle without the price tag of a brand-new model.

Looking for a reliable vehicle that's ready for its next chapter? This car is in good condition and has been well-maintained, offering a smooth and comfortable ride. While it shows some light, honest signs of use, it remains a fantastic choice for anyone seeking quality and dependability. Don't miss out on this great find!

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable option for daily commuting. The exterior shows some signs of age, including minor surface scratches and a small scuff on the rear bumper. Inside, the upholstery is intact but shows typical wear from regular use. Mechanically, the car runs well, though it has higher mileage and will require routine maintenance soon. It’s a solid, functional vehicle for someone looking for a budget-conscious purchase without any hidden surprises.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible wear and some minor dents. The interior shows signs of use and aging. It is currently operational but may require maintenance or minor repairs.

This expertly maintained vehicle offers a sophisticated driving experience, characterized by its mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. Having passed our comprehensive multi-point inspection, it stands as a testament to balanced performance and enduring value. This selection represents a premier opportunity for the discerning professional seeking a reliable, high-caliber motorcar.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and it’s been such a reliable companion. It's in really solid shape and drives like a dream—perfect for your daily commute or a fun weekend road trip! I’ve taken great care of it, so it’s ready to hit the road with its next owner right away. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself how much fun it is to drive!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies. The high-revving valvetrain remains crisp following a recent VANOS overhaul and comprehensive valve clearance adjustment. Power is managed via a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and an M-Variable limited-slip differential. The chassis integrity is bolstered by reinforced rear subframe mounting points and upgraded bushings, ensuring precise lateral stability. While the aesthetics show minor road-wear consistent with its age, the mechanical vitals are robust, including a refreshed cooling system and a firm, predictable brake pedal feel. A driver-focused example optimized for mechanical feedback
Used car. Good condition. Runs well. Interior is clean. Minimal exterior wear. Regular maintenance history available.

This vehicle represents a fantastic balance of reliability and aesthetic appeal, perfect for someone seeking a dependable driver without the new-car price tag. The exterior paint maintains a high-gloss finish, showing only the lightest signs of road wear that one would expect from a carefully driven car. Inside, the interior is exceptionally tidy; the seats are firm and supportive, and the dashboard is free of any cracks or sun damage. Every feature, including the premium audio system and dual-zone climate control, is fully functional. Under the hood, the engine runs quietly and efficiently, backed by a comprehensive service history that proves its consistent upkeep. The brakes are responsive, and the tires have plenty of tread remaining, ensuring this car is road-trip ready from the moment you take the keys. It’s a solid, honest vehicle that has many miles of enjoyment left to give.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering a distinguished balance of performance and long-term reliability. This unit has undergone a comprehensive inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic presentation. A sophisticated choice for the discerning driver seeking exceptional value without compromising on automotive excellence.

Presenting a distinguished vehicle that exemplifies consistent maintenance and refined performance. This unit has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and aesthetic excellence. Ideally suited for the discerning driver seeking a sophisticated balance of reliability and value, it remains in commendable condition and is prepared for immediate delivery.

Hey there! I'm parting with my reliable ride, and it's looking for a new home! This car has been so good to me—it's in solid shape, super dependable, and honestly a joy to drive. It’s been well-maintained and is ready to hit the road with you today. You’re going to love how it handles!

Offering a driver-focused E46 M3 featuring the legendary S54 inline-six engine with independent throttle bodies and double-VANOS timing. This example has undergone extensive preventative maintenance, including reinforced rear subframe mounting points and a recently serviced rod bearing set. The chassis remains taut with upgraded Bilstein B16 adjustable dampers and refreshed bushings throughout. Power is delivered via a precise 6-speed manual gearbox to a variable M differential lock, ensuring optimal traction through the apex. While showing honest patina consistent with its mileage, the mechanical integrity is prioritized, providing a raw, high-revving analog experience without compromise.
Used car in good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Reliable performance.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of luxury and reliability. The exterior retains a deep, mirror-like shine, showing only the minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with careful daily use. Inside, the premium leather upholstery remains supple and free of tears, complemented by a cabin that has never been smoked in. All technological features, including the panoramic sunroof and navigation system, function flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is sound; the engine pulls strongly, the transmission shifts smoothly, and it has recently undergone a full multi-point inspection and oil service. With tires showing significant tread life and a comprehensive service history included, this car is ready for its next owner to drive away with confidence.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies both performance and reliability. This unit has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Offering a refined driving experience, this vehicle represents an exceptional value for the discerning professional seeking quality without compromise.

A premier choice for those seeking a sophisticated driving experience without compromise, this selection exemplifies our commitment to quality and long-term value.

The engine runs smoothly, the transmission shifts seamlessly, and the suspension provides a comfortable yet firm ride. While the exterior shows minor cosmetic touches consistent with light use, the paint retains a deep shine and the body is free of major blemishes. The interior is exceptionally clean, with all power features, climate control, and infotainment systems operating as intended. Recent service records are available, confirming a history of preventative maintenance. This is a robust, road-ready car that offers excellent value for a discerning buyer looking for a dependable and attractive ride.

Well-maintained vehicle. Engine runs smooth. Clean interior. Minor cosmetic wear. Reliable daily driver.

This vehicle represents a fantastic opportunity for a buyer seeking a well-maintained, reliable daily driver that still turns heads. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, with only the minor cosmetic imperfections one would expect from careful, regular use. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean and smoke-free; the seating surfaces are supple and free of any significant wear or tears, and every electronic feature—from the premium sound system to the climate control—functions perfectly. Mechanically, this car has been treated with the utmost respect. It has benefited from a rigorous maintenance schedule, including recent fluid changes and a full brake inspection, ensuring the engine pulls strongly and the transmission shifts with seamless precision. It drives straight and true, offering a composed and comfortable ride that reflects its history of responsible ownership. If you are looking for a vehicle that balances premium features with a proven track record of care, this is the perfect fit.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier selection for the discerning driver. Featuring a robust mechanical profile and a well-preserved interior, the automobile exemplifies consistent care and operational excellence. Prospective owners can expect a refined driving experience supported by documented service history and rigorous inspection standards.
